The '''Mining droid Mark II''' was a bipedal [[mining droid]] designed to mine and extract valuable ores and fuel.

==Characteristics==
The Mark II droids were designed to look humanoid in appearance than the earlier Mark I models, which were smaller and quadrupedal. The Mark II droid was equipped with a more powerful [[Mining laser/Legends|Mining laser]] than the earlier [[KM1 mining droid|Mark I]] droids.

==History==
Mark II mining droids were used extensively during the [[Old Republic era]]. Many of the droids were used at the [[Peragus Mining Facility]] for the mining and extraction of fuel which was to be sold offworld. In [[3951 BBY]] several of these droids were reprogrammed by an [[HK-50 series assassin droid|HK-50]] unit to attack and kill the miners in the Peragus Facility. These were destroyed by the [[Harbinger (assault ship)|Harbinger]] when the ship, commandeered by [[Darth Sion]] fired on the [[Ebon Hawk]] and missed, destroying [[Peragus II]].

==Behind the scenes==
Certain promotional shots seem to show an earlier concept of what the mining droid Mark II looked like. This concept can still be found in the game files.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
